hero.subtitle: Guesthouse — Restaurant
hero.description: Discover an oasis of peace and luxury in the heart of Žitný ostrov. Villa Potoň combines elegance with nature for an unforgettable experience.

welcome.title_line3: in the heart of Žitný ostrov
welcome.description: Discover the perfect combination of comfortable accommodation, exceptional cuisine, and an atmosphere you'll want to return to again and again.

experience.headline_line1: Experience the atmosphere of true relaxation,
experience.title: Experience the Feeling
experience.subtitle: Accommodation, dining, and relaxation under one roof

accommodation.title: Accommodation
accommodation.description: Our modern rooms offer everything you need for a pleasant and undisturbed stay. Whether you come to relax or for a short getaway, you'll find the comfort you can count on.

restaurant.title: Restaurant
restaurant.description: Fresh ingredients, a passion for food, and chefs who know what they're doing. Our menu features homemade specialities and authentic Neapolitan pizza baked in an oven brought directly from Italy. Whether you sit down for lunch, dinner, or a leisurely breakfast, you'll leave with a smile.

bar.title: Neapolitan Pizza
bar.description: Our Italian oven has made the journey all the way from Naples. And the pizza we bake in it is worth every mile. Light and airy dough, quality ingredients, and a traditional technique. You won't find pizza like this anywhere else in the region.

breakfast.title: Breakfast
breakfast.description: Start your morning in peace. We serve both hot and cold breakfast directly in the restaurant. Fresh pastries, homemade treats, and good coffee to give you the energy to start your day.

terrace.title: Terrace
terrace.description: Enjoy peaceful moments on the terrace with a pleasant atmosphere, perfect for morning coffee or evening relaxation.

parking.title: Private Parking
parking.description: Villa Potôň has a large private parking lot with capacity for over 30 vehicles, so you never have to worry about parking.

accessibility.title: Rooms for People with Disabilities
accessibility.description: Our facilities are adapted for guests with reduced mobility, so everyone can enjoy a comfortable and carefree stay.

quote.heading: Your comfort and satisfaction are at the heart of every
quote.subtitle: Whether you want to relax in a pleasant environment or enjoy excellent food, you'll find exactly what you're looking for with us.
quote.imageSubtitle: At Villa Potoň, every detail is designed to make you feel at home, with the peace of nature right outside your door.

activities.title: Where every day is made for you

zitny_ostrov.title: Žitný ostrov
zitny_ostrov.description: Discover the beauty of Žitný ostrov along the Danube, just a short distance from the villa. Peaceful walks, cycling trails, and nature that will slow you down.

golf.title: Golf
golf.description: Golf courses near Veľká Paka and Báč, 10 to 15 minutes by car. Ideal for beginners and experienced players alike.

malkia.title: Malkia Park
malkia.description: A unique big cat rescue park in Orechová Potôň. Just 5 minutes by car.

slovakia_ring.title: Slovakia Ring
slovakia_ring.description: Adrenaline within reach. A racing circuit just 5 minutes from the villa. Races, go-karts, and unforgettable experiences.

thermalpark.title: Thermalpark
thermalpark.description: Thermal pools and wellness in Dunajská Streda, 10 to 15 minutes by car. The perfect full-day programme.

xbionic.title: X-Bionic Sphere
xbionic.description: A modern sports complex in Šamorín, 20 to 25 minutes by car. Equestrian arena, pool, wellness, fitness, and activities for both children and adults.

items.viktoria: The accommodation was nice and clean, with electric blinds that could be fully closed for complete darkness, so I slept really well. The room had air conditioning even though it was quite small, which pleasantly surprised me—I didn't expect it. The staff was very…
items.orru: We chose this place because of its short distance from Šamorín for a race, and it turned out to be a great choice. The rooms were clean, and the beds very comfortable. We ate in the restaurant—the quality/price ratio was excellent, I would say, and the beer was very good. Breakfast is served in the restaurant lounge, both hot and cold options are available, and the staff is very helpful. I recommend staying here.
items.radoslaw: I liked everything—the service, cleanliness, location, and the best part was the food in the restaurant. If I come to this area again, I will only stay there.
items.henrich: Everything was amazing. The staff was extremely accommodating, and the food was delicious. Everything was new, clean, and fragrant. We plan to come back.
items.krisztina: The accommodation is very nice with a unique modern design. The staff and owners are very kind, and the atmosphere is family-like.
items.dominika: Very tasty breakfast and the coffee as well. The location near the Slovakiaring track is an advantage. Very nice services and friendly owners. I highly recommend the excellent duck with croquettes for lunch or dinner. Thank you very much :-)

booking_cta.title: Book your
booking_cta.description: Booking at Villa Potôň is the first step towards your perfect break. We'll tailor everything to your comfort.

footer.claim: A place where you feel at home
